problem id: 49b5ead6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  10001110 -> 10110011
  10111000 -> 00111111
  00110100 -> 00001111
  10011110 -> 10110111
  01000110 -> 10011001
  01111000 -> 00011111
  11101001 -> 01111111
  01100110 -> 10011101
  11110101 -> 01111111
  00110001 -> 01001110

query: 10110010
predicted answer: 10111110
